ModMetaData.name: RimWorld of Magic Scrolls Use Paper
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Moves A RimWorld of Magic's scroll, book and skill crafting off its own magic printer and onto Medieval Overhaul's book scribe table. Each recipe now costs paper instead of cloth/devilstrand, the old magic printer is removed, and the Scribing research now requires the Presser.
